**SET Statements**

> This documentation is for an out-of-date version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/docs/dev/table/sql/set/>).

#  SET Statements #

`SET` statements are used to modify the configuration or list the configuration.

##  Run a SET statement #

SQL CLI

`SET` statements can be executed in [SQL CLI](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.1/docs/dev/table/sqlclient/>).

The following examples show how to run a `SET` statement in SQL CLI.

SQL CLI


    Flink SQL> SET 'table.local-time-zone' = 'Europe/Berlin';
    [INFO] Session property has been set.

    Flink SQL> SET;
    'table.local-time-zone' = 'Europe/Berlin'


##  Syntax #


    SET ('key' = 'value')?


If no key and value are specified, it just prints all the properties. Otherwise, set the key with specified value.
